Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Emeril hosts a group of "recipe rut" moms.
Video.title: Vinaigrettes Aren't Just for Salads

Video.summary: Emeril shares some of his favorite mushroom recipes.
Video.title: Wild Mushrooms

Video.summary: Emeril's Restaurant in New Orleans recipes.
Video.title: Emeril's Restaurant Classics

Video.summary: Add Italian flair to your next dinner with Emeril's favorites.
Video.title: Italian Favorites

Video.summary: New England Patriots superfan Kim Mello helps create New England eats.
Video.title: Boston

Video.summary: Emeril shares the tale of two Louisiana surfers who stumbled on the perfect seaside snack: sea beans!
Video.title: A Surfer's Discovery: Sea Beans

Video.summary: Emeril spotlights Louisiana hot sauce and turns up the heat on Piri Piri Shrimp and Wings with Pimenta Moida Sauce.
Video.title: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Image.alt: No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce
No Pain, No Gain: Louisiana Hot Sauce

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Creole cream cheese, which was almost lost to time until one family farm helped save it.
Video.title: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Image.alt: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Video.summary: For a Seattle style tailgate, Emeril whips up his crowd-pleasing cedar planked salmon.
Video.title: Seattle Seahawks

Video.summary: Vodka and Citrus-Cured Salmon, Caramelized Ruby Red Grapefruit Salad, Key Lime Cheesecake
Video.title: Citrus Rules

Video.summary: Inspired by saffron grown right here in the states, Emeril serves up his famous lobster with pappardelle and saffron cream sauce, seafood paella, and saffron olive oil cake.
Video.title: Saffron from the South

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Bau Nguyen draw inspiration from Vietnamese dishes.
Video.title: with Bau Nguyen

Video.summary: Emeril and jazz legend Kermit Ruffins classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Kermit Ruffins

Video.summary: Smoked Trout Hash with Fried Eggs, Smoked Salmon Cakes on a Bed of Grilled Vegetables over Lemon Dill Sauce

Video.title: Detroit

Video.title: New York Giants
